source: DealOrNoDeal (Lewis et al. 2017, MIT license, via stanfordnlp/cocoa)

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: i would like the ball the hat and 3 books .

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: whoa there . i'll settle for the ball and the hat , you can keep all of the books .

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: cant do that i could give you the ball and a book and i take the hat and 3 books .

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: books hold no value to me . i'd urge you to reconsider taking all of the books and leaving the ball and hat to me .

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: thats not going to happen ill take all the books and the ball .

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: well , instead of playing hard ball with you . . . how about you just take all 4 books and the hat ; i do not need a book as they hold no value to me .

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: ok you got a deal i get the books and the hat you get the ball .
